steps: Prepare 5x M9 salt, 1M calcium chloride and magnesium sulfate solutions respectively using the following reagents. M9 Minimal Salts 5X Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M9956 1 M Calcium Chloride (CaCl2) Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP510 1 Liter Magnesium sulfate solution [1M] G-Biosciences Catalog #786-530

Add 200 mL M9 Minimal Salts 5X Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M9956 100 mL 2% casamino 100 µL 1 M Calcium Chloride (CaCl2) Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP510 2 mL 1 Liter Magnesium sulfate solution [1M] G-Biosciences Catalog #786-530
Top up with sterile deionized water to make a litre of M9 media. Water refers to sterilized deionized water Contributed by users
creator: NUS iGEM
